NameGen.Description: Names based on Greco-Roman mythology. Suitable for generating names of gods, heroes, and similar entities.
NameGen.Markov: Abas Abderus Abundantia Acaste Acastus Acca Aceso Achelous Acheron Achilles Achlys Acis Acrisius Actaeus Adikia Admete Admetus Adonis Adrasteia Adrastus Aeacus Aegea Aegeus Aegimius Aegis Aegisthus Aegyptus Aella Aeneas Aeon Aequitas Aerecura Aesculapius Aeson Aeternitas Aether Aethra Aetna Aetolus Aeëtes Agamemnon Agasthenes Agathos Agdistis Agenor Agenoria Aglaea Agon Aidos Aion Aius Ajax Alala Alastor Alcestis Alcibie Alcinous Alcmaeon Alecto Alernus Aletheia Aleus Algea Alke Alpheus Amalthea Amechania Ammon Amphiaraus Amphictyon Amphilochus Amphilogiai Amphion Amphirho Amphitrite Amphitryon Amycus Amymone Anagyros Anaideia Ananke Anaxagoras Anchises Andreus Androktasiai Andromache Andromeda Anemoi Angelia Angelos Angerona Angitia Anius Anna Annona Antaeus Antandre Anteros Antevorta Antigone Antilochus Antiope Anytos Apate Apemosyne Aphaia Apheleia Aphrodite Apollo Ara Arachne Arcesius Ares Arete Areto Argeus Argia Argus Argyron Ariadne Arimanius Aristaeus Arke Artemis Asbolus Asclepius Asia Asopus Assaracus Asteria Asterion Asterodia Asterope Astraea Astraeus Astrape Atabyrius Atalanta Ate Athamas Athena Atlas Atreus Augeas Augusta Augustus Aura Aurora Autesion Auxesia Auxo Averruncus Aëthlius Bacchus Bakis Bellerophon Bellona Beroe Bia Bias Bona Bonus Bouzyges Branchus Bremusa Briseis Britomartis Brizo Bronte Bubona Busiris Cabeiri Caca Cacus Cadmus Caelestis Caelus Caeneus Caerus Calchas Calliope Callirhoe Calypso Camarina Camenae Capheira Car Cardea Carmenta Carmentes Carmentis Carna Carnus Carpo Carya Cassandra Cassiopeia Castor Catreus Cecrops Ceisus Celaeno Celeus Cephalus Cepheus Cerceis Ceres Ceto Chalcon Chaos Charnabon Charon Chronos Chryseis Chrysippus Chryson Cinyras Circe Clementia Clio Clitemneste Cloacina Clymene Clytemnestra Clytie Codrus Coeus Comus Concordia Consus Corinthus Corus Coryphe Cranaus Creon Cres Cresphontes Cretheus Criasus Crius Cronus Cupid Cura Cybele Cylarabes Cynortas Cyzicus Daedalus Daeira Daimon Damia Damnameneus Damon Danaus Danaë Daphne Dardanus Decima Deianeira Deimos Deiphontes Demeter Demonax Demophon Despoina Devera Deverra Dexione Dexithea Diana Dike Diomedes Dione Dionysus Dioscuri Disciplina Discordia Dispater Dius Dodone Doris Dryad Duellona Dysnomia Echemus Echetus Eetion Egeria Eidyia Eileithyia Eirene Electra Electryon Eleos Elephenor Elernus Eleusis Eleutheria Elpis Empanda Ennomus Enodia Enyalius Enyo Eos Eosphorus Epaphus Ephyra Epimetheus Epione Epona Epopeus Erato Erebus Erechtheus Erginus Erichthonius Erinyes Eris Eros Ersa Eteocles Euagoreis Eubuleus Eucleia Eudora Eulabeia Eunomia Eunostus Euphrosyne Eupraxia Europa Eurotas Euryale Eurybia Eurydice Eurynome Eurypyle Eurystheus Eusebeia Euterpe Euxantius Falacer Fama Fascinus Fauna Faunus Faustitas Febris Februus Fecunditas Felicitas Ferentina Feronia Fides Fidius Flora Fons Fontus Fornax Fortuna Fufluns Fulgora Furrina Gaia Galaxaura Ganymede Gelanor Gelos Genita Genius Geras Glaucus Gorgon Hades Haemus Halia Halitherses Harmonia Harpy Hebe Hecate Hector Hecuba Hedone Heimarmene Helen Helenus Helernus Helios Hemera Hephaestus Hera Heracles Hercules Hermaphroditus Hermes Hermione Hesione Hestia Hestyaea Himeros Hippo Hippolyta Hippothoe Hippothoön Homados Homer Homonoia Honos Hora Horae Horkos Horme Hormenius Hyacinth Hybris Hygieia Hymen Hyperion Hypnos Hyrieus Hysminai Iacchus Iache Iamus Ianeira Ianthe Iapetus Iaso Icarus Ida Idmon Idyia Ilus Inachus Indiges Intercidona Inuus Invictus Invidia Ioke Iolaus Iovi Iphigenia Iphito Iris Ismene Ixion Janus Jason Jocasta Juno Jupiter Justitia Juturna Juventas Kakia Kerberos Keres Korybantes Kouretes Kratos Kydoimos Lampedo Laomedon Larentia Lares Larunda Latona Laverna Laërtes Lelantos Lemures Lethe Leto Letum Leucippe Leucothea Levana Liber Libera Liberalitas Libertas Libitina Libye Limos Litae Locutius Lua Lucina Luna Lupercus Lycaon Lycurgus Lycus Lympha Lyris Lysagora Lysithoe Lyssa Macelo Machai Maenads Magna Makedon Makelo Mana Manes Mania Maniae Manto Mantus Marpesia Mars Mater Matuta Medea Medusa Megaira Megalesius Megareus Melampus Melanippe Melanthus Meleager Melia Meliboea Melite Melobosis Melpomene Memnon Menelaus Menestheus Menestho Menippe Menoetius Mentis Mercurius Mercury Merope Methe Metis Midas Mimon Minerva Minos Minotaur Mithras Mnemosyne Moirai Molae Molpadia Momus Moneta Mopsopia Mopsus Moros Morpheus Mors Morta Murcia Murtia Muses Mutunus Mylas Myles Myrina Naenia Nascio Neaera Necessitas Neikea Nemesis Nemorensis Neptune Neptunus Nereids Nereus Nerio Opora Ops Orcus Orestes Orion Orithyia Ormenos Orpheus Orthanes Otrera Oxyntes Paean Palaemon Palaestra Palatua Pales Palioxis Pallas Pan Panacea Panda Pandia Pandion Pandora Pantariste Parcae Paregoros Pasikrate Pasiphae Pasithoe Pater Pax Pegasus Peitharchia Peitho Peleus Pelias Pelops Penates Penelope Peneus Penia Penthesilea Pentheus Penthus Periboea Periphas Perse Perseis Persephone Porus Poseidon Postverta Postvorta Pota Pothos Praxidike Priam Priapus Proetus Proioxis Prometheus Promylaia Prophasis Proserpina Proteus Providentia Prymno Pudicitia Pylades Pythia Querquetulanae Quirinus Quiritis Remus Rhadamanthys Rhapso Rhea Rhesus Rhode Rhodea, Rhodeia Rhodia Rhodope Rhodos Robigo Robigus Roma Romulus Rumina Sabazios Salacia Salus Sancus Sarpedon Saturn Satyr Scamander
